content:
# Swishy message and notification templates - Overview

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: toast, notification stack, chat overlay, message preview, activity feed
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

Visual traits:
- spring notification
- stacked cards
- iOS-style pop-up
- message bubble
- bounce
- slide-in

Use when:
- toast
- notification stack
- chat overlay
- message preview
- activity feed

Avoid when:
- legal warning
- destructive confirmation
- long-form content

AI summary: Use Swishy-style notification motion for toast/message stacks: slide-in, spring settle, staggered cards, quick dismissal, accessible announcement, and reduced-motion fade fallback.

# Swishy message and notification templates - Layout Rules

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: toast, notification stack, chat overlay, message preview, activity feed
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Notifications should enter from a predictable edge and stack with clear z-order.
- Use spring/bounce for friendly non-critical messages; use restrained motion for errors or security alerts.
- Let notifications settle quickly and avoid covering primary controls for too long.

AI summary: Use Swishy-style notification motion for toast/message stacks: slide-in, spring settle, staggered cards, quick dismissal, accessible announcement, and reduced-motion fade fallback.

# Swishy message and notification templates - Accessibility Notes

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: toast, notification stack, chat overlay, message preview, activity feed
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Announce important notifications through accessible live regions.
- Do not auto-dismiss critical errors before they can be read.
- Respect reduced motion by using fade instead of spring slide.

AI summary: Use Swishy-style notification motion for toast/message stacks: slide-in, spring settle, staggered cards, quick dismissal, accessible announcement, and reduced-motion fade fallback.

# Swishy message and notification templates - Implementation Hints

Page type: component_pattern
Use cases: toast, notification stack, chat overlay, message preview, activity feed
Evidence: summary_only / medium
Source: https://www.swishy.ai/

- Use translateY/translateX plus opacity for entry; add small scale overshoot for friendly motion.
- Stagger stacked cards by 60-120ms and reduce scale/opacity for cards behind the top item.
- Pair with Liquid Glass by making notification cards frosted, rounded, and rim-lit.

AI summary: Use Swishy-style notification motion for toast/message stacks: slide-in, spring settle, staggered cards, quick dismissal, accessible announcement, and reduced-motion fade fallback.
